MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Ethan P. Niedermeyer, Esq. (925.212.0379; ethan@theswansonlawgroup.com) of Swanson Law Group for moving party.
No other appearances.

Court Spanish Interpreter, Patrice Binaisa, and interpreter provided by moving party are excused as there is no appearance by Plaintiff.

Hearing held in closed courtroom. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for PLAINTIFF ANA RODRIGUEZ is GRANTED. Prevailing party to submit a proposed order on judicial council form via email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-09-2022 Continued To Feb-14-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. ETHAN P. NIEDERMEYER, Esq. of the Swanson Law Group (Tel: 818-852-7300) as movant/counsel-of record for plaintiff (via Zoom videoconference);
Plaintiff ANA RODRIGUEZ present in-person in the courtroom and is assisted by court Spanish-language interpreter MURIEL FALAK (Ms. Falak appearing via Zoom videoconference);
Atty. FRANK M. LA FLEUR, Esq. of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3826) for defendant City and County of San Francisco (via Zoom videoconference).

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF ANA RODRIGUEZ.

Matter discussed. Mr. Niedermeyer indicates that some information he would need to convey to the Court involves attorney-client privilege.

The Court continues this matter for further hearing to February 14, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. The Court intends to call this matter last on the calendar so that it may be discussed outside the presence of all other matters.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2021 Continued To Jan-11-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-20-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff ANA RODRIGUEZ (Tel: 415-933-3042) present and is assisted by certified Spanish-language interpreter MONICA HERNANDEZ (who has an oath on file);
No other appearances are made in this matter.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF ANA RODRIGUEZ.

Matter discussed. The Court orients Ms. Rodriguez as to the Court's tentative ruling.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion by plaintiff's counsel to be relieved as counsel is denied without prejudice. According to the most recent order issued by the case management department, the arbitrator's jurisdiction expired on August 12, 2021. If counsel obtains a reasonable extension of the arbitrator's jurisdiction that would permit plaintiff to obtain new counsel or to represent herself at the arbitration, and responds to the order to show cause re arbitration set for November 9, 2021, counsel may renew the motion.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
